overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic survival game showing a character navigating through a stormy industrial container yard during heavy rain, climbing to an elevated platform overlooking a flooded cityscape, and descending into the flooded streets below. The atmosphere is dark and ominous with low visibility due to the storm.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wooden corridor leading to exterior

events.description: character exits dark wooden corridor into stormy outdoor container yard
lighting shifts from dim interior to stormy exterior with heavy rain visible

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow wooden corridor and emerging into open container yard with metal shipping containers

entered.detail: dark wooden planks forming narrow passage walls
large corrugated metal shipping container with rust marks
metal chain-link fence with metal posts
overgrown grass and dirt ground surface

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark wooden corridor with the character walking toward a bright exit. At approximately 2 seconds, the character emerges into a stormy industrial container yard with overgrown grass, metal shipping containers, and chain-link fences visible in the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: container yard perimeter with security fencing

events.description: character climbs onto metal shipping containers to reach elevated platform

agents.ego_description: walking along chain-link fence with barbed wire and climbing up metal shipping containers to gain elevation

entered.detail: coiled barbed wire along top of chain-link fence
flat metal surface on top of stacked shipping containers

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the perimeter of the container yard, following a chain-link fence topped with barbed wire. Heavy rain continues to fall as the character approaches stacked shipping containers and climbs up to reach an elevated metal platform, revealing a view of the flooded area beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation platform overlooking flooded urban wasteland

events.description: character reaches elevated platform revealing panoramic view of flooded city

agents.ego_description: standing on elevated metal platform looking out over vast flooded landscape with dead trees, submerged buildings, and distant skyscrapers in the storm

entered.detail: safety railing along edge of elevated platform
vast expanse of flooded streets with submerged ruins and debris
tall damaged buildings visible through storm clouds in the distance
numerous dead tree trunks and stumps emerging from flood waters

segments.scene_description: From the elevated metal platform, the character observes a vast post-apocalyptic landscape where a city has been completely flooded. Dead trees emerge from the dark water, ruined buildings dot the horizon, and storm clouds obscure the sky. The character remains mostly stationary, panning to take in the devastation.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded street with submerged tree stumps and urban ruins

events.description: character begins moving along platform edge toward descent point
character climbs down from platform into the flooded street below

agents.ego_description: moving along elevated platform edge and climbing down into flooded street, wading through water among dead trees and debris

entered.detail: street completely submerged in dark water with debris floating
damaged concrete walls and building remnants
submerged derelict vehicle partially visible in water

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the edge of the observation platform and descends into the flooded street below. Now at ground level, the character wades through dark water filled with dead tree stumps, concrete ruins, and debris from the destroyed city, with abandoned vehicles partially submerged nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the confines of a dark interior out into a vast, rain-drenched post-apocalyptic wasteland. It begins in a dim wooden corridor, moving toward a bright exit before emerging into a stormy industrial container yard filled with overgrown grass and chain-link fences. As the character follows a barbed-wire perimeter, the camera ascends a stack of shipping containers to reach an elevated metal platform, where the view expands to reveal a flooded city with ruined buildings and dead trees under a heavy storm. The scene then shifts from this high vantage point as the character descends back to ground level, finally wading through dark, debris-filled waters among submerged vehicles and concrete ruins.
